slides.title: Satellite Analyzer

content.subtitle: Turning raw imagery into actionable land-use intelligence

speaker_notes: Open by framing the repository as an analyst workflow accelerator.
Emphasize that the system connects raw scenes to reviewable findings.
slides._paragraph: Satellite Analyzer helps analysts process imagery and identify meaningful changes across regions.

slides.title: Core Insight

content.statement: The repo is built around a simple pipeline: ingest imagery, detect changes, then summarize risks.

speaker_notes: Use this slide to establish the mental model for the rest of the deck.
Point out that each major module supports one pipeline stage.
slides._paragraph: The project combines image preprocessing, feature extraction, and report generation for geographic risk review.

slides.title: What Works and What Needs Attention

right_bullets: Cloud masking is still placeholder logic

speaker_notes: Make clear that the incomplete cloud masking feature affects analysis quality.
Mention batching as an operational improvement.
slides._paragraph: The analysis found mature ingestion and comparison modules, plus one placeholder cloud masking feature.

slides.title: Recommended Next Step

content.headline: Prioritize production-grade cloud masking before expanding model coverage.
content.cta: Schedule a focused implementation pass on masking, tests, and validation scenes.

speaker_notes: End with a concrete action instead of a broad roadmap.
Tie the recommendation back to the most important incomplete feature.
slides._paragraph: Cloud masking is the clearest blocker before the tool can support reliable analyst workflows.
